hero_subtitle: SFTY provides a unified compliance layer that governs escalation rules, assigns ownership, and captures audit trails to deliver clear operational risk visibility for leadership teams.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Executive teams face challenges managing escalation workflows without consistent rules and transparent decision logs. This creates gaps in audit readiness and hinders clear operational risk oversight across compliance cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY establishes consistent escalation rules, assigns clear ownership, and preserves decision logs to give executives centralized visibility and a defensible audit trail for compliance case governance.
workflow_title: From escalation rules to governance controls
workflow_description: SFTY connects escalation triggers through assigned ownership, review actions, decision logs and preserved evidence to enforce structured governance controls.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond manual escalation. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives a unified compliance layer that governs escalation workflows with structured decisions, case ownership, audit trails and clear operational risk visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with governed escalation workflows, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment to enhance operational risk visibility and strengthen bank due diligence.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support governance for escalation workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how escalation rules control case ownership and audit
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how escalation decisions preserve evidence and review logs
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe deployment options for scalable executive risk governance
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for executive risk control?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance operating view that improves risk visibility, audit trails, bank due diligence, and governance controls over digital asset compliance workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY govern escalation workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures escalation workflows using configurable rules, case ownership, role-based access, and audit logs to support clear decision accountability and compliance oversight.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves evidence by capturing decision logs, case history, provider outputs and review actions in an auditable format supporting internal and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and other providers into a single workflow without disrupting existing compliance tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY acts as a provider-neutral control layer, connecting and structuring outputs from existing compliance providers rather than replacing them.
final_title: Structure escalation governance with clear audit trails
final_description: Review how SFTY supports escalation workflows, decision ownership and audit-ready governance for executive risk control at VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
